TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tamahu ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 218 buwan, 771 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 708 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 63 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Rukay 2%, Cou 1%, Paywan 4%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tamahu hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tamahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tamahu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tamahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tamahu hya' ga Dai-ni. tay 'llaw na Tamahu hya' ga Sʉhlʉnganʉ. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tamaħu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, rukaj *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa *ai-ni. taj ʔllaw na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕ*ħl*ŋan*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tamahu ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 218 buwan, 771 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 708 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 63 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Rukay 2%, Cou 1%, Paywan 4%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tamahu hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tamahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tamahu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tamahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tamahu hya' ga Dai-ni. tay 'llaw na Tamahu hya' ga Sʉhlʉnganʉ. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tamaħu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, rukaj *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa *ai-ni. taj ʔllaw na tamaħu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕ*ħl*ŋan*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
